  "description": "Wephco Technology&nbsp;(also known as Weph and Co Group) is an Abuja-based real estate and property technology (PropTech) firm that specializes in luxury brokerage and international investment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Property Manager / Marketer
Job Location:Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview&nbsp;


	WEPHCO is looking for a high-performance Property Manager / Marketer to manage, position, and close high-value real estate opportunities.
	This role requires a commercially driven individual who can attract, engage, and convert premium clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage property listings, inspections, and client interactions
	Develop and execute marketing strategies for property sales and leasing
	Identify and pursue high-value real estate opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and stakeholders
	Negotiate and close deals effectively
	Ensure properties are well-positioned to attract premium buyers or tenants


Requirements


	Proven experience in real estate, property management, or marketing
	Strong sales, negotiation, and closing skills
	Good understanding of the real estate market and client expectations
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment


What We&rsquo;re Looking For:


	You deliver results &mdash; not excuses
	You move fast, think sharply, and execute flawlessly
	You understand value, positioning, and premium clients
	You are driven by growth, targets, and performance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;crm@wephco.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquires&nbsp;call 08123654562.",

Property Manager / Marketer Job at Wephco Technologies




        
    

        
        Wephco Technology (also known as Weph and Co Group) is an Abuja-based real estate and property technology (PropTech) firm that specializes in luxury brokerage and international investment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Property Manager / Marketer
Job Location:Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	WEPHCO is looking for a high-performance Property Manager / Marketer to manage, position, and close high-value real estate opportunities.
	This role requires a commercially driven individual who can attract, engage, and convert premium clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage property listings, inspections, and client interactions
	Develop and execute marketing strategies for property sales and leasing
	Identify and pursue high-value real estate opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and stakeholders
	Negotiate and close deals effectively
	Ensure properties are well-positioned to attract premium buyers or tenants


Requirements


	Proven experience in real estate, property management, or marketing
	Strong sales, negotiation, and closing skills
	Good understanding of the real estate market and client expectations
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment


What We’re Looking For:


	You deliver results — not excuses
	You move fast, think sharply, and execute flawlessly
	You understand value, positioning, and premium clients
	You are driven by growth, targets, and performance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquires call 08123654562.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Our product portfolio comprises Solar Systems for Private and Commercial users as well as the Public Sector. Our Goal is to Secure the power supply Chain at all times, in the most reliable and to make it simple for our customers. We strive to deliver Outstanding Service, and products, that meet the demands of today&#39;s energy provision and prepare for tomorrow&rsquo;s challenges.&lrm;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human resources manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, and social media promptly and professionally
	Provide accurate information about solar lighting products and services
	Assist customers with product selection based on their needs
	Handle complaints and resolve issues efficiently to ensure customer satisfaction
	Process orders, track deliveries, and follow up with customers
	Maintain records of customer interactions and transactions
	Coordinate with the technical team for installation and maintenance support
	Follow up on customer feedback to improve service quality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;&nbsp;kmtsolar250@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Human Resources Manager Job at KMT Solar




        
    

        
        KMT Solar is a Supplier of Solar Installations and Ecological Energy Technology, we deliver Integrated Sustainable Energy Production Solutions. Our product portfolio comprises Solar Systems for Private and Commercial users as well as the Public Sector. Our Goal is to Secure the power supply Chain at all times, in the most reliable and to make it simple for our customers. We strive to deliver Outstanding Service, and products, that meet the demands of today's energy provision and prepare for tomorrow’s challenges.‎

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human resources manager

Job Location: Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



 Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, and social media promptly and professionally
	Provide accurate information about solar lighting products and services
	Assist customers with product selection based on their needs
	Handle complaints and resolve issues efficiently to ensure customer satisfaction
	Process orders, track deliveries, and follow up with customers
	Maintain records of customer interactions and transactions
	Coordinate with the technical team for installation and maintenance support
	Follow up on customer feedback to improve service quality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Openings at Mojec International
content:
Mojec International is one of the leading top 3 Pan African Energy integrated companies in Africa; chiefly known as the market leader and innovator in metering technology and renewable solar energy.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) National Sales Manager (Power & Energy)

Job Location:  Across State Electricity Markets, Nigeria
Employment Type:  Full-Time (Permanent)
Function: Sales / Business Development

????Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead sales strategy and market expansion for energy metering solutions within Nigeria’s power sector.
	Drive revenue growth, manage key stakeholder relationships, and position the company across utilities, regulators, and emerging energy markets.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute sales and marketing strategies for metering products and energy solutions
	Identify, engage, and manage key customers including DiSCos and large energy users
	Drive revenue growth through new business opportunities and market expansion
	Lead contract negotiations and manage commercial agreements
	Monitor market trends, pricing, and competitor activities to inform strategy
	Build strong relationships with government agencies, regulators, and industry stakeholders
	Oversee market research and maintain relevant industry intelligence
	Provide strategic input on local and international market opportunities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, or related field (MBA is an advantage)
	Minimum of 8 years’ experience, with at least 3 years in a managerial role within the power/energy sector
	Strong understanding of Nigeria’s power value chain and metering market
	Familiarity with key regulators such as REA, NERC, NEMSA, and SON
	Proven experience in B2B sales, contract negotiation, and stakeholder management.


Core Competencies:


	Strong commercial and negotiation skills
	Market analysis and strategic planning capability
	Knowledge of metering systems and energy solutions
	Ability to manage multiple high-value transactions.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and Resume to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using the Job title as the subject of the email

 

 

2.) Regional Sales Manager – Smart Energy Metering Solutions

Job Location: Regional Sales at each Geopolitical zones 
Employment Type:  Full-Time (Permanent)
Job Function: Sales / Business Development / Energy Solutions

??????Role Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Regional Sales Manager to lead revenue growth across designated State Electricity Markets in Nigeria.
	The role involves driving B2B and B2C sales of smart energy metering solutions, managing distribution channels, and building strategic partnerships within the power sector value chain.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive regional sales strategy and achieve assigned revenue targets
	Develop and manage relationships with Distribution Companies (DisCos), contractors, and key stakeholders
	Expand B2B and B2C channels for smart metering and energy solutions
	Lead, mentor, and supervise regional sales teams
	Identify new market opportunities within the Nigerian Electricity Supply Industry (NESI)
	Monitor competitor activities and provide market intelligence
	Prepare periodic sales forecasts, reports, and performance analysis


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree (B.Sc / HND) in Business Administration, Engineering, Marketing, or related field
	Minimum of 4–7 years of experience in sales, preferably within the power, energy, or technology sector
	Proven experience in field sales and team leadership
	Strong understanding of Nigeria’s electricity market and metering ecosystem
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint


Preferred Advantage:


	Experience working with electricity Distribution Companies (DisCos)
	Background in smart metering, renewable energy, or energy technology solutions
	Knowledge of regulatory frameworks (e.g., NERC guidelines).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and Resume to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email

 

 

3.) Business Development & Sales Manager (EV Manufacturing)

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria (with regional engagement)

Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute strategic business and sales plans tailored to Nigeria’s automotive market and regulatory landscape.
	Identify, engage, and close new business opportunities with OEMs, fleet operators, and corporate clients.
	Build strong relationships with industry stakeholders, government agencies, and clients to support EV adoption.
	Promote the benefits of our electric vehicles to prospective clients, including cost efficiency, sustainability, and compliance with local regulations.
	Monitor market trends, competitive landscape, and policy changes impacting EV adoption in Nigeria.
	Lead the end-to-end sales process, ensuring targets are met or exceeded.
	Collaborate with marketing to optimize campaigns and drive brand awareness.
	Report regularly on sales performance, KPIs, and market insights.
	Recruit, mentor, and manage a high-performing sales team.
	Work closely with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Operations to achieve corporate objectives.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or related field; MBA is a plus.
	Minimum 5 years of experience in automotive sales and business development; EV experience preferred.
	Experience with automotive assembly or local manufacturing operations is highly desirable.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of CRM software and sales analytics.
	Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills; fluency in English required, local languages a plus.
	Strong leadership, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Knowledge of Nigerian automotive policies, incentives, and EV market dynamics is a major advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and Resume to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Geoplex Drillteq Limited
content:
Geoplex Drillteq Limited - The fastest growing indigenous Service Company in Nigeria today was established in June 2002 to provide Oilfield Services to the upstream sector of the fast expanding Oil and Gas industry in Nigeria and the West Africa Coastal region. The Government policies aimed at encouraging and ensuring more participation by competent Nigerians in the upstream Oil & Gas Industry has contributed to our growth process.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Facility Specialist

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As the Facility Specialist, you will be responsible for the day-to-day management, maintenance and supervision of the company’s facility-related activities.
	This includes managing repairs, maintenance, utilities, space planning, vendor coordination, and ensuring compliance with health and safety standards. 


Key Responsibilities


	Support in the supervision and management of daily facility operations, ensuring office spaces, utilities, and equipment are in optimal condition. 
	Develop and oversee preventive and corrective maintenance schedules for electrical, mechanical, HVAC, and plumbing systems. 
	Monitor building security systems, fire safety systems, and emergency preparedness measures. 
	Coordinate with external vendors, service providers, and contractors for repairs, cleaning, security, and maintenance services. 
	Manage workspace allocation, office moves, and redesigns to optimize space utilization. 
	Support in maintaining accurate records of assets, inventory, and equipment lifecycles. 
	Support planning and execution of facility upgrades, renovations, and expansions. 
	Assist in preparing and monitoring the facility budget, including cost forecasts and expense tracking. 
	Support in logistics coordination for facility operations including coordinating transportation of materials, personnels, managing delivery scheduled & ensuring timely supply of equipment and consumables. 
	Generate reports on facility performance, maintenance schedules, and utility consumption. 
	Recommend cost-saving initiatives without compromising safety or quality. 
	Ensure compliance with local regulations, building codes, and occupational health and safety standards. 
	Promote sustainability initiatives including energy efficiency, waste management, and resource conservation. 
	Maintain all necessary permits, licenses, and inspection records. 


Required Qualifications


	HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Building Technology, Civil Engineering, Estate Management, or related field. 
	Minimum of 4 years of relevant experience in facility or building management. 
	Knowledge of facility systems such as HVAC, plumbing, lighting, electrical, and access control. 
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and facility maintenance software. 
	Familiarity with HSE policies and facility-related compliance standards. 


Benefits


	Structured Technical Training & Development across multiple oilfield service lines
	Career Growth Pathway into roles such as Facility Manager, Facility Asset Integrity Lead
	Competitive Compensation, including field allowances
	Comprehensive Health Insurance.


Application Closing Date: 11th April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

2.) Diesel Equipment Operator

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview


	Grow your career in the oil and gas industry with Geoplex Drillteq Limited.
	This role provides hands-on exposure across Electric Wireline, Slickline, Coiled Tubing, and Cementing services, offering a unique opportunity to develop practical skills in operating, maintaining, and troubleshooting diesel-powered oilfield equipment.
	You will work in dynamic field environments (onshore, offshore, and swamp), gaining real-world experience that builds a strong foundation for a long-term technical career.


Key Responsibilities


	Support the operation of diesel-powered equipment across multiple service lines to ensure safe and efficient service delivery.
	Assist with equipment startup, shutdown, and real-time monitoring during operations.
	Monitor and report key performance parameters such as temperature, pressure, and load conditions
	Mobilize with equipment and crew to field locations including onshore, offshore, and swamp environments
	Maintain high levels of discipline, responsiveness, and situational awareness in demanding field conditions


Maintenance & Troubleshooting:


	Assist in executing preventive maintenance programs (PM1, PM2, PM3) to ensure equipment reliability
	Support troubleshooting of diesel engines and associated hydraulic and pneumatic systems
	Perform basic repairs and component replacements under supervision
	Ensure proper lubrication, servicing, and cleanliness of equipment
	Participate in routine inspections (daily, weekly, periodic)
	Identify early signs of wear, malfunction, or inefficiencies
	Support initiatives aimed at minimizing downtime and improving equipment performance


HSSE Compliance:


	Adhere strictly to all Health, Safety, Security, and Environmental (HSSE) standards
	Participate in toolbox talks, risk assessments, and safety drills
	Ensure safe handling and usage of fuel, lubricants, and tools


Documentation & Inventory:


	Support maintenance documentation and reporting
	Assist in tracking spare parts, consumables, and tools


Required Qualifications


	OND / HND in Automobile Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field
	Ability to troubleshoot and maintain good maintenance practices
	Basic understanding of: Diesel engine systems (fuel, cooling, lubrication) Mechanical systems and components Hydraulic and pneumatic systems
	Ability to read and interpret technical manuals.
	Demonstrated willingness to learn and develop hands-on technical skills.


Benefits


	Structured Technical Training & Development across multiple oilfield service lines
	Career Growth Pathway - Build a foundation for progression into roles such as Maintenance Technician, Senior Equipment Operator, Maintenance Supervisor.
	Field Exposure to diverse operational environments, including onshore, offshore, and swamp locations
	Competitive Compensation, including field allowances
	Comprehensive Health Insurance.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Electronics Trainee

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Description


	This role is ideal for HND graduates in Electrical/Electronic Engineering who have completed NYSC and are eager to build practical experience in a technical lab environment within the oil & gas industry.


Key Responsibilities:


	Assist in testing, troubleshooting, and repairing electronic tools
	Support calibration and maintenance of lab equipment
	Document test results and prepare basic technical reports
	Ensure compliance with safety and laboratory procedures


Requirements


	HND qualification in Electrical / Electronic Engineering or related fields
	Completed NYSC (mandatory)
	Basic knowledge of electronic circuits and test instruments
	Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn.


Application Closing Date: 30th April, , 2026.

Click here to apply online

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Event Assistant",
  "description": "At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Event Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Events Manager / Operations Lead

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and energetic Event Assistant to support the planning, coordination, and execution of events, as well as assist with related operations such as hall setup and equipment rentals.
	The ideal candidate will provide administrative and on-ground support to ensure events run smoothly while maintaining high service standards. This role requires strong organizational skills, the ability to multitask, and a proactive approach to problem-solving.


Key Responsibilities
Event Planning Support:


	Assist in planning and coordinating events from concept to execution.
	Support in preparing event timelines, checklists, and schedules.
	Liaise with vendors, suppliers, and service providers as directed.
	Assist in sourcing materials, d&eacute;cor items, and equipment.


Event Execution:


	Provide on-site support during events to ensure smooth operations.
	Assist with event setup and breakdown, including hall arrangements and equipment placement.
	Coordinate with internal teams (logistics, operations, rentals) during events.
	Handle last-minute issues and provide immediate solutions under supervision.


Administrative Duties:


	Maintain records of bookings, client requests, and event details.
	Assist in preparing quotations, invoices, and event documentation.
	Follow up with clients and vendors regarding event requirements.
	Support general office and coordination tasks.


Client &amp; Vendor Coordination:


	Communicate with clients to understand basic event requirements.
	Support relationship management with vendors and partners.
	Ensure all client requests are accurately documented and executed.


Logistics &amp; Inventory Support:


	Assist in tracking event materials and rental equipment.
	Ensure proper handling and return of rented items.
	Support inventory checks before and after events.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any relevant field.
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in event planning, hospitality, or administrative support (NYSC experience acceptable).
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends and public holidays.
	Willingness to work on-site during events.
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@elvaridah.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail email.",

Event Assistant Job at Elvaridah




        
    

        
        At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Event Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Events Manager / Operations Lead

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and energetic Event Assistant to support the planning, coordination, and execution of events, as well as assist with related operations such as hall setup and equipment rentals.
	The ideal candidate will provide administrative and on-ground support to ensure events run smoothly while maintaining high service standards. This role requires strong organizational skills, the ability to multitask, and a proactive approach to problem-solving.


Key Responsibilities
Event Planning Support:


	Assist in planning and coordinating events from concept to execution.
	Support in preparing event timelines, checklists, and schedules.
	Liaise with vendors, suppliers, and service providers as directed.
	Assist in sourcing materials, décor items, and equipment.


Event Execution:


	Provide on-site support during events to ensure smooth operations.
	Assist with event setup and breakdown, including hall arrangements and equipment placement.
	Coordinate with internal teams (logistics, operations, rentals) during events.
	Handle last-minute issues and provide immediate solutions under supervision.


Administrative Duties:


	Maintain records of bookings, client requests, and event details.
	Assist in preparing quotations, invoices, and event documentation.
	Follow up with clients and vendors regarding event requirements.
	Support general office and coordination tasks.


Client & Vendor Coordination:


	Communicate with clients to understand basic event requirements.
	Support relationship management with vendors and partners.
	Ensure all client requests are accurately documented and executed.


Logistics & Inventory Support:


	Assist in tracking event materials and rental equipment.
	Ensure proper handling and return of rented items.
	Support inventory checks before and after events.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in any relevant field.
	1–2 years of experience in event planning, hospitality, or administrative support (NYSC experience acceptable).
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends and public holidays.
	Willingness to work on-site during events.
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
